chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1894 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to non-prosecution of main petition, as duplicate set not supplied by the Counsel for the petitioner. 30.01.2018. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G. This Constitutional Petition is called for hearing. Neither petitioner nor his Counsel is present. No intimation received. Same was the position on the last two dates of hearing viz. 08.02.2016 and 02.02.2017. As per office note the petitioner has not provided duplicate set. It appears that the petitioner has no interest in this matter, which is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
